span.b: Qualifying Conditions for filing Form C-S:

field.name: isRevBelow5M
field.string: The company's revenue for the financial period is S$5,000,000 or below?

field.name: isOnlyIncTxbl17
field.string: The company derives only income subject to tax at 17%?

field.name: isNotClaimingSpecificItems
field.string: The company is not claiming/ utilising any of the following items:

group.div:
a. Carry-back of Current Year Capital Allowances/ Losses
b. Group Relief
c. Investment Allowance
d. Foreign Tax Credit and Tax Deducted at Source

span.b: Particulars of Person who Reviewed the Return:

field.name: sctpInd
field.string: The return has been reviewed by a person who is a Singapore Chartered Tax Professionals Limited (SCTP) Accredited Tax Advisor or Accredited Tax Practitioner for Income Tax.

div.p: The financial period for this return based on the company's financial statements is to .

field.name: profitLossBeforeTaxation
field.string: Net Profit/ Loss before Tax as per Financial Statements

field.name: adjPLBefDed
field.string: Adjusted Profit/ Loss before Other Deductions

field.name: renoWorksExpS14Q
field.string: Deduction for Renovation or Refurbishment Works under Section 14Q14N

field.name: c1_FurtherDed
field.string: Further Deductions/ Other Deductions including revenue expenses capitalised or expenses incurred under Section 14U14R

field.name: sgAdjPLAft
field.string: Adjusted Profit/ Loss before Capital Allowances

span.b: Deduction of Unutilised Capital Allowances/ Losses/ Donations Brought Forward:

field.name: uCALDChangePrinAct
field.string: Is there a change in the principal activities of the company during the relevant dates?

field.name: sholderChange
field.string: Is there a substantial change in the company's ultimate shareholders and their shareholdings as at the relevant dates?

field.name: unutilCALDClaimS23S37
field.string: Unutilised Capital Allowances/ Losses/ Donations claimed where waiver of the shareholding test has been/ will be granted by IRAS

span.b: Tax Exemption Scheme for New Start-up Companies:

field.name: fullTxX
field.string: Has the company satisfied all conditions to qualify for the tax exemption scheme for new start-up companies?

span.b: Deduction of Expenditure on Research and Development (R&D):

field.name: expRD
field.string: Deduction for expenditure incurred on R&D - Total deduction under Section 14D14C

field.name: expRDSG
field.string: Section 14D14C deduction for expenditure incurred on R&D activities undertaken in Singapore

field.name: enhanceDeductRD
field.string: Staff costs and consumables for R&D activities undertaken in Singapore qualifying for Section 14DA(1)14D(1)

span.b: Appropriation of Trading Stock or Conversion of Non-Trade/ Capital Asset:

field.name: estTaxPayable
field.string: The estimated tax payable is computed based on the declaration in this return. This amount takes into account the Exempt Amount and Corporate Tax Rebate, where applicable.

field.name: isFullAndTrueAccOfCompInc
field.string: The company declares that this return gives a full and true account of the whole of the company's income for the financial period ending in the preceding year.

field.name: isQualifiedToUseConvFormCS
field.string: The company maintains Singapore dollar as its functional/ presentation currency.

group.div:
The company is not an investment holding company.
The company does not own subsidiaries, associates and/ or joint ventures.
The company has no investment in intangibles and has not discontinued its operations.
The company is not:
a. listed or is in the process of issuing its debt equity instruments for trading on a securities exchange in Singapore;
b. listed on a securities exchange outside Singapore;
c. a financial institution; and
d. a company limited by guarantee registered under the Charities Act (Cap 37).

div.span: The company maintains Singapore dollar as its functional/ presentation currency.
The company is not an investment holding company or a service company that provides only related party services.
The company does not own subsidiaries, associates or joint ventures, and has no investment in intangibles.

separator.string: Other Property, Plant and Equipment (Non-HP)(Low Value Assets)

label.string: Please review the following Tax Computation & Schedules

separator.string: Non-HP Assets - Additions during the current YA

label.string: Other Property, Plant and Equipment (Non-HP) Group
Other Property, Plant and Equipment (Non-HP)(Low Value Assets) Group

separator.string: HP Assets - Additions during the current YA

label.string: Other Property, Plant and Equipment (HP) Group
Other Property, Plant and Equipment (Non-HP) Group
Other Property, Plant and Equipment (HP) Group

separator.string: Non-HP Assets - Disposals during the current YA

label.string: Other Property, Plant and Equipment (Non-HP)(Low Value Assets) Group
Other Property, Plant and Equipment (Non-HP) Group

separator.string: HP Assets - Disposals during the current YA

label.string: Other Property, Plant and Equipment (HP) Group

span.b: Documents to be Submitted to IRAS via the ‘Submit Document’ digital service:

p.b: Declaration Form for S19B Allowances on IPR if this is the first YA of the writing-down allowances claim.

field.name: appStockConvAsset
field.string: AC Reporting Form if the company had appropriated trading stock for non-trade or capital purposes under Section 10J and/or converted non-trade or capital asset to trading stock under Section 32A of the Income Tax Act 1947.

group.p:
The relevant Form for completion is available on IRAS’ website.
Documents Retention
The company does not need to submit its financial statements, tax computation and supporting schedules with the Form C-S. Please retain the documents and submit them to IRAS only upon request.
Late Filing
Penalties may be imposed if this return is filed late.
GST Registration
Companies with revenue of more than S$1 million (excluding dividends and interest) may need to register for GST. For details, refer to GST Registration on IRAS' website.

field.name: isFullAndTrueAccOfCompInc
field.string: The company declares that this return gives a full and true account of the whole of the company's income for the financial period ending in the preceding year.

field.name: isQualifiedToUseConvFormCS
field.string: The company maintains Singapore dollar as its functional/ presentation currency.

p.b:
The company is not an investment holding company or a service company that provides only related party services.
The company does not own subsidiaries, associates or joint ventures, and has no investment in intangibles.

span.b: Qualifying Conditions for filing Form C-S:

field.name: isRevBelow5M
field.string: The company's revenue for the financial period is S$5,000,000 or below

field.name: isOnlyIncTxbl17
field.string: The company derives only income subject to tax at 17%

field.name: isNotClaimingSpecificItems
field.string: The company is not claiming/ utilising any of the following items:

group.div:
a. Carry-back of Current Year Capital Allowances/ Losses
b. Group Relief
c. Investment Allowance
d. Foreign Tax Credit and Tax Deducted at Source

div.p: The financial period for this return based on the company's financial statements is to .

field.name: profitLossBeforeTaxation
field.string: Net Profit/ Loss before Tax as per Financial Statements

field.name: adjPLBefDed
field.string: Adjusted Profit/ Loss before Other Deductions

field.name: renoWorksExpS14Q
field.string: Deduction for Renovation or Refurbishment Works under Section 14N

field.name: c1_FurtherDed
field.string: Further Deductions/ Other Deductions including revenue expenses capitalised or expenses incurred under Section 14R

field.name: sgAdjPLAft
field.string: Adjusted Profit/ Loss before Capital Allowances

span.b: Deduction of Unutilised Capital Allowances/ Losses/ Donations Brought Forward:

field.name: uCALDChangePrinAct
field.string: Is there a change in the principal activities of the company during the relevant dates?

field.name: sholderChange
field.string: Is there a substantial change in the company's ultimate shareholders and their shareholdings as at the relevant dates?

span.b: Tax Exemption Scheme for New Start-up Companies:

field.name: fullTxX
field.string: Has the company satisfied all conditions to qualify for the tax exemption scheme for new start-up companies?

span.b: Deduction of Expenditure on Research and Development (R&D):

field.name: expRD
field.string: Deduction for expenditure incurred on R&D - Total deduction under Section 14C

field.name: expRDSG
field.string: Section 14D14C deduction for expenditure incurred on R&D activities undertaken in Singapore

field.name: enhanceDeductRD
field.string: Staff costs and consumables for R&D activities undertaken in Singapore qualifying for Section 14D(1)

field.name: furtherDeductRD
field.string: Futher Deduction for expenditure on R&D project - Section 14E

p.b: Appropriation of Trading Stock or Conversion of Non-Trade/ Capital Asset

field.name: appStockConvAsset
field.string: Has the company appropriated any trading stock for non-trade or capital purposes under Section 10J and/ or converted any non-trade or capital asset to trading stock under Section 32A?

field.name: estTaxPayable
field.string: The estimated tax payable is computed based on the declaration in this return. This amount takes into account the Exempt Amount and Corporate Tax Rebate, where applicable.
